Title: Verify Obbiettivi class attributes and operations
Test Steps:
1. Verify the attributes: IdAchievement, claim
2. Verify the operation: Set_achievement(int i)
Expected Result: All attributes and operations are present in the Obbiettivi class.

Title: Verify Gioco class attributes and operations
Test Steps:
1. Verify the attributes: id, utenteld, greenPoints
2. Verify the operations: incrementaGreenPoints(punti: int), decrementaGreenPoints(punti: int)
Expected Result: All attributes and operations are present in the Gioco class.

Title: Verify user creation process
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve user data from the local user
2. Validate the user data
3. If the data is valid, add the user to the system
4. If the data is invalid, prompt the user to re-enter the data
Expected Result: The user is added to the system with valid data.

Title: Verify user profile viewing process
Test Steps:
1. Check if the user is authenticated
2. If authenticated, request user data from the Data Manager
Expected Result: User data is retrieved and displayed.

Title: Verify data modification process
Test Steps:
1. Request user data modification from the local user
2. Update the data with the modified data
3. If the data is invalid, prompt the user to re-enter the data
Expected Result: The user's data is updated with valid data.

Title: Verify consumption data request process
Preconditions: User has at least one consumption
Test Steps:
1. Request consumption data from the local user
2. Retrieve consumption data from the Data Manager
Expected Result: Consumption data is retrieved and displayed.

Title: Verify report request process
Preconditions: User has at least one consumption
Test Steps:
1. Request a report from the local user
2. Retrieve the report from the Data Manager
Expected Result: The report is retrieved and displayed.

Title: Verify report update process
Preconditions: User has at least one consumption
Test Steps:
1. Request consumption data from the local user
2. Update the report with the new data
3. If the data is invalid, prompt the user to re-enter the data
Expected Result: The report is updated with valid new data.

Title: Verify report deletion process
Preconditions: User has at least one consumption
Test Steps:
1. Request consumption data from the local user
2. Delete the report
